goal: Build a full Synthetic Data Generation (SDG) pipeline for YOLOv8 object-detection training. Scene: Franka at a table with 6 cubes in various positions. Domain randomization covers lighting intensity, cube color, cube texture, and pose jitter. configure_coco_yolo_writer sets up a multi-camera COCO + YOLO writer. create_sdg_pipeline registers the render product and annotators. export_dataset runs the full 200-frame generation loop. benchmark_sdg reports throughput. analyze_randomization validates distribution coverage before export. SUCCESS: /tmp/sdg_yolov8/images/ contains 200 RGB frames AND /tmp/sdg_yolov8/annotations/instances.json is valid COCO with class 'cube'. Exercises add_domain_randomizer (×4 types), configure_coco_yolo_writer, create_sdg_pipeline, preview_sdg, analyze_randomization, export_dataset, benchmark_sdg. Realizes industrial-scene-sdg-full-pipeline-001 (industrial category, tier-2).
thoughts: Pattern: other (SDG pipeline — no robot motion, no pick-place delivery criterion).
Full SDG pipeline means: scene build → DR authoring → writer config → pipeline creation → pre-flight (analyze + preview) → export → throughput benchmark.

Four DR axes: (1) lighting intensity on DomeLight, (2) cube color, (3) cube texture (material swap), (4) cube pose jitter. Covers the standard photometric + geometric variance needed for robust YOLOv8 detector.
configure_coco_yolo_writer is called with cameras=['/World/SdgCamera'] and categories=['cube']. format='coco' produces instances.json compatible with YOLOv8 --data flag. id_offset left default.

create_sdg_pipeline uses annotators=['rgb', 'bounding_box_2d'] — sufficient for object detection. output_format='coco' activates the CocoWriter path in the handler. 200 frames is enough for a meaningful detection training set.
analyze_randomization(num_samples=50) before export verifies all 4 DR axes have std>0. If any axis collapses the canonical fails early rather than generating 200 useless frames.
preview_sdg(num_samples=6) generates a quick 2×3 grid to let the operator spot lighting or texture anomalies.
export_dataset runs the step-loop asynchronously (step_batch=20) to avoid blocking the Kit UI. output_dir must match configure_coco_yolo_writer output_dir.
benchmark_sdg(num_frames=20, annotators=['rgb','bounding_box_2d']) measures FPS so the operator knows wall-clock cost before scaling to larger datasets.

Distinct from CP-NEW-defect-sdg (defect classification, 20 cubes, no YOLO writer, no export_dataset, no benchmark_sdg). Distinct from CP-NEW-dr-curriculum-trainer (RL training curriculum, uses preview_dr + launch_training, no SDG pipeline writer at all). This canonical is the ONLY one that exercises configure_coco_yolo_writer + export_dataset + benchmark_sdg together as a packaged training-data factory.
motion_controllers: none — pure data generation, no arm motion in this workflow.
BLOCKER: omni.replicator extension must be enabled. The export loop may stall if Kit runs in headless mode without a valid render product — handler should surface a clear 'no render product' error.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Table surface ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 6 labelled cubes on the table surface ─────────────────────────────────────
for i in range(6):
    col = i % 3
    row = i // 3
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(
        prim_path=path,
        prim_type="Cube",
        position=[col * 0.16 - 0.16, row * 0.22 - 0.11, 0.81],
        size=0.07,
    )
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name="cube")

# ── SDG camera (overhead nadir, slight tilt for realistic occlusion) ───────────
configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/SdgCamera",
    position=[0, 0, 1.65],
    look_at=[0, 0, 0.75],
    fov=55,
)

# ── Domain randomization — 4 axes ────────────────────────────────────────────
# Axis 1: DomeLight intensity
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/DomeLight",
    randomizer_type="lighting",
    params={"intensity_min": 300.0, "intensity_max": 2500.0},
)

# Axis 2: cube surface color
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.05, 0.05, 0.05], "color_max": [0.95, 0.95, 0.95]},
)

# Axis 3: cube texture material swap
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="texture",
    params={},
)

# Axis 4: cube pose jitter (small XY + yaw only — keep on table)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.5, "max_angle": 0.5, "surface_prim": "/World/Table"},
)

# ── Pre-flight: validate DR distribution ─────────────────────────────────────
_dr_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=50)
# Expect 4 axes with std > 0: intensity, color, texture, pose

# ── Pre-flight: visual preview ────────────────────────────────────────────────
preview_sdg(num_samples=6)

# ── Configure COCO/YOLO writer ────────────────────────────────────────────────
configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8",
    cameras=["/World/SdgCamera"],
    format="coco",
    categories=["cube"],
)

# ── Create full SDG pipeline ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_sdg_pipeline(
    annotators=["rgb", "bounding_box_2d"],
    output_format="coco",
    num_frames=200,
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8",
    camera_position=[0, 0, 1.65],
    camera_look_at=[0, 0, 0.75],
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

# ── Throughput benchmark (20 frames) before full run ─────────────────────────
benchmark_sdg(
    num_frames=20,
    annotators=["rgb", "bounding_box_2d"],
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

# ── Full export: 200 annotated frames ────────────────────────────────────────
export_dataset(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8",
    num_frames=200,
    step_batch=20,
)
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16-A49; form-gate-schema TBD; function-gate BLOCKED (requires omni.replicator extension + live Kit with GPU render product)
failure_modes: omni.replicator not enabled: enable_extension('omni.replicator.core') must be called before create_sdg_pipeline; the handler may auto-enable it but surface an error if Kit was launched without --enable-extension flag
configure_coco_yolo_writer cameras=['/World/SdgCamera']: camera prim must exist before writer config; configure_camera creates it but the path must match exactly

add_domain_randomizer type='texture': cubes need valid OmniPBR materials; plain-color DisplayColor cubes may no-op the texture swap silently — assign a base OmniPBR mat to /World/Cube_.* before the randomizer if texture axis collapses
add_domain_randomizer type='pose' surface_prim='/World/Table': Table must have a PhysicsCollisionAPI so PhysX can report its surface; missing API causes pose jitter to project cubes through the table
analyze_randomization std==0 on any axis: if Kit simulation has not stepped at least once, Replicator graph may not have fired — call sim_control(action='step') before analyze_randomization
export_dataset step_batch=20: if Kit render product is not ready the step loop stalls; check that preview_sdg completed at least one frame before export
benchmark_sdg must be called AFTER create_sdg_pipeline (pipeline must exist); calling it before pipeline registration returns 'no active pipeline' error
Output dir /tmp/sdg_yolov8 must be writable; on shared servers /tmp may be small — use a project-local path (e.g. workspace/sdg_output/) and ensure gitignore covers it
extension_notes: First canonical in library to use export_dataset + benchmark_sdg as primary tools. configure_coco_yolo_writer was used in CP-NEW-defect-sdg but without export_dataset or benchmark_sdg. This template is a self-contained training-data factory: scene build → DR authoring → COCO writer → pipeline → analyze → preview → benchmark → export. Covers industrial-scene-sdg-full-pipeline-001 backlog entry.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

for i in range({{n_cubes}}):
    col = i % 3
    row = i // 3
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[col*0.16-0.16, row*0.22-0.11, 0.81], size=0.07)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name="cube")

configure_camera(
    camera_path={{sdg_camera.path}},
    position={{sdg_camera.position}},
    look_at={{sdg_camera.look_at}},
    fov=55,
)

add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/DomeLight", randomizer_type="lighting", params={"intensity_min": 300.0, "intensity_max": 2500.0})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cube_.*", randomizer_type="color", params={"color_min": [0.05, 0.05, 0.05], "color_max": [0.95, 0.95, 0.95]})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cube_.*", randomizer_type="texture", params={})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cube_.*", randomizer_type="pose", params={"min_angle": -0.5, "max_angle": 0.5, "surface_prim": "/World/Table"})

_dr_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=50)
preview_sdg(num_samples=6)

configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8",
    cameras=[{{sdg_camera.path}}],
    format="coco",
    categories=["cube"],
)

create_sdg_pipeline(
    annotators=["rgb", "bounding_box_2d"],
    output_format="coco",
    num_frames=200,
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8",
    camera_position={{sdg_camera.position}},
    camera_look_at={{sdg_camera.look_at}},
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

benchmark_sdg(num_frames=20, annotators=["rgb", "bounding_box_2d"], resolution=[1280, 720])
export_dataset(output_dir="/tmp/sdg_yolov8", num_frames=200, step_batch=20)
